result.summary: Found 4 issues: one major content error with a negative jackpot value, two major layout/clipping issues with truncated navigation and game cards, and one minor cosmetic issue.

issues.description: The 'Cop the Lot Megaways' game card displays a negative jackpot value of '-$6,266.13', which is nonsensical for a jackpot amount and likely indicates a data or rendering bug.
issues.suggestion: Investigate the jackpot data feed for this game. Jackpot values should never be negative. Add validation to prevent negative values from being displayed to users.

issues.description: Game cards on the right side of both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are cut off mid-content (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNG MI...', 'HYPERC...', 'DAR WATE...'), making them appear broken and unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the horizontal carousel or grid properly clips or scrolls cards rather than cutting off text/images at the viewport edge. Consider using a horizontal scroll container with visible scroll indicators.

issues.description: The navigation tab bar at the top clips the last visible item to 'Hot Ga' instead of showing the full label (likely 'Hot Games'), indicating an overflow issue without a scroll affordance.
issues.suggestion: Add horizontal scrolling to the navigation tab bar with a visible fade or arrow indicator to signal that more tabs exist beyond the current viewport.

issues.description: The partially visible game cards on the right edge have no visual affordance (such as a gradient fade or scroll arrow) to indicate that the content is scrollable, which may confuse users.
issues.suggestion: Add a right-edge gradient overlay or a chevron/arrow icon to hint at horizontal scrollability for these game card rows.
